scenario: presentationFor(type) for llm-wiki content. Under the RESOLVED reading A (pageKind = the open type), the page kinds (concept/entity/note) and wiki-source are NOT in KNOWN_TYPES → generic fallback. Mirrors renderer/all-types.json's byRelPath shape. SPECIFICATION golden (llm-wiki adapter = Chunk 4).
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — llm-wiki adapter is built in CHUNK 4.
specSource: docs/design/akm-0.9.0-bundle-adapter-spec.md §2 / §3.4 (unknown type ⇒ generic renderer + `akm show <ref>`); §0.2 (the `wiki` asset-type dies); src/core/type-presentation.ts (TYPE_PRESENTATION has a 'wiki' entry → wiki-md, but 'wiki' is retired per §0.2); src/core/recognition-util.ts KNOWN_TYPES.
realWorldSource: src/output/renderers.ts wiki-md renderer (still present in code); src/wiki/wiki.ts page model
notes: SPECIFICATION golden. RESOLVED (open question 2, maintainer resolution 2026-07) — wiki page `type` = frontmatter pageKind (reading A). concept/entity/note/wiki-source are NOT in KNOWN_TYPES → presentationFor returns DEFAULT_PRESENTATION {label:'Asset'}, renderer=null, generic action `akm show <ref>`. Wiki pages render GENERICALLY; the pre-existing `wiki-md` renderer (still in src/output/renderers.ts) goes UNUSED under this resolution.

Reading B (map all wiki page kinds to the `wiki-md` renderer / label 'Wiki', carrying pageKind as metadata) was CONSIDERED and REJECTED because it reuses the retired-per-§0.2 `wiki` presentation. The per-entry `alternativeRenderer` blocks that recorded reading B have been removed — reading A is the single finalized form.
The reserved files (schema/index/log) are not rendered as concepts.
